codes.recommended_next_action_de: System-Inventar und Fehlerindikatoren erfassen.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Collect system inventory and fault indicators.

codes.explanation_en: Windows partition not safely mountable read-only.
codes.recommended_next_action_de: Mount-Plan prüfen; kein Schreibzugriff erzwingen.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Review mount plan; do not force write access.

codes.explanation_de: BitLocker nicht aktiv; Dateizugriff read-only möglich.
codes.explanation_en: BitLocker not active; read-only file access possible.
codes.recommended_next_action_de: Weiter mit Inspect; BitLocker-Status vor jedem Dateizugriff erneut prüfen.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Continue inspect; re-check BitLocker before each file access.

codes.explanation_de: BitLocker aktiv, Volume locked — keine Dateisicherung, keine Registry aus geschütztem Volume.
codes.explanation_en: BitLocker active, volume locked — no backup, no registry from protected volume.
codes.recommended_next_action_de: Recovery-Key-Handoff anzeigen; Operator liefert Key lokal.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Show recovery key handoff; operator provides key locally.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Verschlüsselungsstatus dokumentieren; kein Dateizugriff ohne Klärung.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Document encryption status; no file access until clarified.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Operator liefert Recovery Key; niemals im Repo oder Telemetrie speichern.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Operator provides recovery key; never store in repo or telemetry.

codes.explanation_en: BitLocker status unclear — file access blocked.
codes.recommended_next_action_de: Read-only BitLocker-Prüfung wiederholen; nicht annehmen dass inaktiv.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Repeat read-only BitLocker check; do not assume inactive.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Kein Dateizugriff; Status dokumentieren und Operator informieren.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: No file access; document status and inform operator.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Daten zuerst sichern; Offline-SFC/DISM nur als Vorschlag.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Back up data first; offline SFC/DISM as suggestion only.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Mount-/BitLocker-Status prüfen.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Check mount/BitLocker status.

codes.explanation_en: Winlogon Shell value missing or suspicious.
codes.recommended_next_action_de: Registry-Befund dokumentieren; keine automatische Reparatur.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Document registry finding; no automatic repair.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Shell-Startkette prüfen; WinRE-Vorschlag.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Review shell startup chain; suggest WinRE.

codes.explanation_en: EFI system partition missing or unreadable.
codes.recommended_next_action_de: Boot-Struktur dokumentieren; BCD/EFI prüfen.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Document boot structure; check BCD/EFI.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: WinRE/BCD-Offline-Analyse vorschlagen.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Suggest WinRE/BCD offline analysis.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: WinRE-Wiederherstellungsumgebung prüfen.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Check WinRE recovery environment.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Setup/Panther/CBS-Logs indexieren.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Index Setup/Panther/CBS logs.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Kein chkdsk /f aus Rescue; Datenrettung priorisieren.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: No chkdsk /f from rescue; prioritize data recovery.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Nur Planungsbericht; keine Partitionierung.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Planning report only; no partitioning.

codes.explanation_de: Cloud-Backup nur Dry-Run/Export in diesem MVP.
codes.explanation_en: Cloud backup dry-run/export only in this MVP.
codes.recommended_next_action_de: Manifest erzeugen; Upload erst nach Operator-Freigabe.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Generate manifest; upload only after operator approval.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Provider-Auswahl und Freigabe separat.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Provider selection and approval separately.

codes.explanation_en: Windows beta/Insider build detected or suspected.
codes.recommended_next_action_de: Reparatur nur als Vorschlag; Migration stable planen.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Repair as suggestion only; plan stable migration.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Lokale verschlüsselte Queue; Retry oder Netzwerk prüfen.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Local encrypted queue; retry or check network.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Operator konfiguriert Auth außerhalb des Repos.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Operator configures auth outside repo.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Schema validieren; kein Upload bis gültig.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Validate schema; no upload until valid.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Status gelb; Retry mit ACK-Pflicht.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Status yellow; retry with ACK requirement.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Status rot; Integrität prüfen, erneut senden.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Status red; verify integrity, resend.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Warteschlange im DCC anzeigen; spätere Nachübertragung.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Show queue in DCC; deferred re-upload.

codes.recommended_next_action_de: Manuelle oder geplante Nachübertragung.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Manual or scheduled re-upload.

codes.explanation_de: Payload enthält zu viele personenbezogene Daten.
codes.explanation_en: Payload contains too much personal data.
codes.recommended_next_action_de: Privacy-Guard blockiert; nur diagnostic_metadata.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Privacy guard blocks; diagnostic_metadata only.

codes.explanation_en: Operator consent for extended data missing.
codes.recommended_next_action_de: Freigabe einholen oder Payload reduzieren.
codes.recommended_next_action_en: Obtain consent or reduce payload.
